About Business / Description: Michy Tech Hub is a technology store that sells laptops, desktops, accessories, networking equipment and offers computer repair, software installation, CCTV installation and IT support services.

Service: Laptop Repair.
Description: Comprehensive diagnosis and repair of laptops, including screen replacement, keyboard repair, charging port repair, motherboard troubleshooting, battery replacement, overheating issues, software errors, and hardware upgrades..
Price: GHS 150.00.
Duration: 1-3 days.
Availability: Available.

Service: Desktop Repair.
Description: Professional repair and maintenance of desktop computers, including faulty hardware replacement, power supply repair, motherboard diagnostics, operating system issues, and performance optimization..
Price: GHS 200.00.
Duration: 1-3 days.
Availability: Unavailable.

Service: Windows Installation.
Description: Installation or reinstallation of genuine Microsoft Windows operating systems, including driver installation, system updates, and basic optimization for improved performance..
Price: GHS 100.00.
Duration: 30-45 minutes.
Availability: Available.

Service: Microsoft Office Installation.
Description: Installation and activation of Microsoft Office applications such as Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and Access, with configuration for immediate use..
Price: GHS 120.00.
Duration: 30 minutes.
Availability: Available.

Service: Data Recovery.
Description: Recovery of deleted, formatted, or inaccessible files from laptops, desktops, hard drives, SSDs, USB flash drives, and memory cards. Recovery success depends on the condition of the storage device..
Price: GHS 350.00.
Duration: 1-5 days.
Availability: Unavailable.

Service: Virus Removal.
Description: Detection and removal of viruses, malware, spyware, ransomware, and other malicious software. Includes system cleanup, security optimization, and antivirus installation if required..
Price: GHS 150.00.
Duration: 1-2 hours.
Availability: Available.

Service: Laptop Cleaning.
Description: Internal and external cleaning service that removes dust from cooling fans, keyboards, vents, and internal components to improve cooling, reduce overheating, and extend device lifespan..
Price: GHS 80.00.
Duration: 45 minutes.
Availability: Available.

Service: CCTV Installation.
Description: Supply, installation, and configuration of CCTV surveillance systems for homes, offices, shops, schools, and commercial premises. Includes camera setup, DVR/NVR configuration, remote viewing, and basic user training..
Price: GHS 1,500.00.
Duration: 1-3 minutes.
Availability: Available.

Service: Network Setup.
Description: Installation and configuration of wired and wireless networks for homes and businesses, including routers, switches, Wi-Fi access points, printers, and secure internet sharing..
Price: GHS 1,000.00.
Duration: 2-5 hours.
Availability: Unavailable.

Service: Home IT Support.
Description: On-site technical support for homes and small offices, including computer troubleshooting, internet setup, printer installation, software installation, device configuration, and general IT assistance..
Price: GHS 200.00.
Duration: 1 minutes.
Availability: Unavailable.

Question: Do you accept Mobile Money (MoMo)?
Answer: Yes we accept MoMo payments on all networks

Question: Do you deliver to Accra?
Answer: Yes we ship Nationwide via VIP Bus or OA Travel.

Question: Do you repair MacBooks?
Answer: Yes, we repair MacBook Air and MacBook Pro models after diagnosis.

Question: How long does laptop repair take?
Answer: Most repairs take between 24 and 72 hours depending on the fault.

metadata.title: How long does laptop repair take?

Question: Do you offer delivery?
Answer: Yes, we deliver Nationwide

Answer: Yes, we accept MTN MoMo, Telecel Cash and AirtelTigo Money.

text:
Question: Do your products come with a warranty?
Answer: Yes. Warranty periods vary from 1 month to 24 months depending on the product.

metadata.title: Do your products come with a warranty?

text:
Question: Do you install CCTV cameras?
Answer: Yes, we install CCTV systems for homes, offices and businesses.

Question: Can you recover deleted files?
Answer: Yes, data recovery is available but success depends on the condition of the storage device.

Question: Do I need an appointment?
Answer: No. Walk-in customers are welcome during business hours.

Question: Do you sell genuine accessories?
Answer: Yes, we sell genuine and high-quality accessories from trusted brands.

Question: Can you upgrade my laptop?
Answer: Yes, we upgrade RAM, SSDs, batteries and other compatible components.

Question: What are your business hours?
Answer: Monday to Saturday from 8:30 AM to 7:30 PM.

Question: Do you provide on-site IT support?
Answer: Yes, we offer on-site IT support for homes and businesses.

metadata.title: Do you provide on-site IT support?

text:
Question: Can I request a quotation?
Answer: Yes, quotations are provided free for most services.

Question: How can I contact customer support?
Answer: You can contact us by phone, WhatsApp or email.

metadata.title: How can I contact customer support?

text:
Question: What brands do you sell?
Answer: We sell HP, Dell, Lenovo, Acer, ASUS, Canon, Epson, TP-Link and other leading brands.

Michy Tech Hub Company Profile

About Us

Michy Tech Hub is a leading technology solutions provider based in Madina, Accra, Ghana. Established in 2018, we specialize in computer sales, repairs, networking solutions, CCTV installations, software installation, and IT consultancy for individuals, businesses, schools, and organizations.

Our goal is to make technology reliable, affordable, and accessible by providing high-quality products and exceptional customer service.

Our Mission

To provide reliable technology products and professional IT services that help individuals and businesses stay productive.

Our Vision

To become one of Ghana’s most trusted IT service providers through innovation, integrity, and customer satisfaction.

Our Core Values

Professionalism

Honesty

Quality Service

Innovation

Customer Satisfaction

Business Hours

Monday – Saturday

8:30 AM – 7:30 PM

Closed on Sundays and Public Holidays.

Contact Information

Phone: +233 59 999 0483

WhatsApp: +233 59 999 0483

Email: info@michytechhub.com

Address: Madina Zongo Junction, Accra

Services

Laptop Repair

Desktop Repair

Windows Installation

Microsoft Office Installation

Data Recovery

Virus Removal

Laptop Cleaning

CCTV Installation

Network Setup

Home IT Support

We also sell laptops, accessories, printers, networking equipment, storage devices, monitors, and computer peripherals from trusted brands including HP, Dell, Lenovo, ASUS, Acer, Canon, Epson, TP-Link, Logitech, Kingston, Samsung, APC, and Seagate.

metadata.title: Michy Tech Hub Company Profile.docx - Part 1

text:
Michy Tech Hub Repair and Warranty Policy

Repair Diagnosis

Every device received undergoes a full diagnosis before repair. Customers are informed of the problem and repair cost before work begins.

Repair Time

Most software repairs are completed within the same day.

Hardware repairs typically take between one and three business days.

Complex motherboard repairs and data recovery may take up to five business days.

Warranty

All new laptops include a one-year warranty unless otherwise stated.

Accessories carry warranties ranging from one month to two years depending on the manufacturer.

Repair work carries a thirty-day service warranty covering the repaired fault only.

Customer Responsibilities

Customers should back up important files before submitting devices.

Michy Tech Hub is not responsible for data loss caused by hardware failure.

Unclaimed Devices

Devices left uncollected for more than ninety days may attract storage charges.

metadata.title: Michy Tech Hub Repair and Warranty Policy.docx - Part 1
